payload.title: Apply PolicyPoint external IDs and pending questions
payload.description:
Update the existing PolicyPoint scorecard setup with the source system external IDs supplied by the user.

Scope:
- Set scorecard external ID to `1562` for `PolicyPoint - Non-Sales`.
- Set score external IDs 48846-48859 for the named questions.
- Create any missing question records where needed.
- Use workbook Items Template rubrics when available for guidelines/configuration.
- Validate any generated or changed guidelines with `skills/guidelines/validate_guidelines.py`.
- Verify final Plexus state by read-back.
